brief: Fix 3 flaky list-ordering tests in civicmeetings (timestamp tie-break nondeterminism)

goals.title: G1-baseline
goals.objective: 10x repeated runs of the 3 flaky tests with per-test failure counts recorded

goals.title: G2-root-cause
goals.objective: exact ORDER BY sites and tie mechanism identified with file:line evidence

goals.title: G3-fix
goals.objective: deterministic capture_seq secondary sort in notice_checklist, packet_assembly, vendor_sync plus migration 0017

goals.title: G4-proof
goals.objective: 10x post-fix runs of the 3 tests with 0 failures plus full affected-file test pass
